notes: no-arg surface lowers to canonical function and refuses at runtime without parser execution
nextval advances non-transactional SBLR sequence runtime state
NULL sequence identity is invalid because no runtime object is identified
no-arg currval surface lowers to canonical function and refuses at runtime
currval reads runtime state after nextval
no-arg gen_id surface lowers to canonical function and refuses at runtime
GEN_ID routes to sequence next with explicit increment
zero generator increment is rejected by SBLR sequence runtime
lastval returns NULL int64 when no identity value exists in the execution context
no-arg setval surface lowers to canonical function and refuses at runtime
setval assigns sequence state and false is_called makes nextval return assigned value
NULL is_called propagates NULL without sequence mutation
